message:
Optimize push/worktree/stats: batch R2 writes, incremental worktree, size cache

Performance improvements (500-file repo benchmark):
- Initial push: 972ms → 52ms (19x) — batch R2 writes in packfile unpack
- Incremental push: 827ms → 12ms (69x) — diff old/new tree, only write changes
- Stats endpoint: 167ms → 68ms (2.5x) — cache blob sizes in SQLite

Key changes:
- packfile-reader: prepare all objects (hash+compress) then batch flush to R2
- git-engine: add prepareObject/putObjects for batch writes, file size cache
- checkout: accept oldCommitSha, diff trees, only write changed/added files
- receive-pack: pass old SHA to materializeWorktree for incremental updates
- repo-store: add file_sizes table schema
